rationale: Tests whether CR catches performance and reliability anti-patterns: N+1 insert loops and retry without idempotency keys
Tests whether CR catches classic input-based security flaws (SQL injection via string interpolation) and data exposure (payment card data in logs)

bug_nature: Validation gap / Type mismatch / Aggregate invariant
rationale: Tests whether CR cross-references implementation against spec ACs: off-by-one boundary, enum value mismatch, and non-atomic transfer violating invariant

bug_nature: Score inflation / Severity misclassification / Fake debt-band fix
rationale: Tests whether CR audits function quality scores skeptically: all-100 inflation, underclassified severity, and comments-only debt-band fix

bug_nature: Shared mutable state / Missing error path / Timer pollution
rationale: Tests whether CR identifies test anti-patterns: order-dependent counters, untested exception paths, and module-level patches without cleanup

bug_nature: Dead code / Semantic dissonance / Catch-all error handling
rationale: Tests whether CR catches maintainability issues: exported dead code inflating coverage, misleading comments with no backing implementation, and error swallowing
Tests whether CR detects ambiguous spec language around capacity boundaries and flags the absence of an exact-boundary test to pin down behavior
Tests whether CR catches that admin override replaces original requester in history logs, violating audit trail integrity requirements
Tests whether CR catches that transferStock bypasses destination capacity check, allowing transfers to push warehouses over maxCapacity
